---
title: "UDC Pipeline Schema"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · udc_pipeline.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-068](../../adr/adr-068-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/udc/udc_pipeline.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/udc/udc_pipeline.schema.json)
- **Dialect:** `http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#`
- **`$id`:** `https://uiao.gov/schemas/udc/udc_pipeline.schema.json`
:::

## Description

JSON Schema for validating UDC compiler pipeline configurations

## Top-Level Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `pipeline_stages` | array&lt;object&gt; | ✓ |  |
| `pipeline_config` | object |  |  |

## Full Schema

```{.json filename="udc_pipeline.schema.json"}
{
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "$id": "https://uiao.gov/schemas/udc/udc_pipeline.schema.json",
  "title": "UDC Pipeline Schema",
  "description": "JSON Schema for validating UDC compiler pipeline configurations",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "pipeline_stages"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "pipeline_stages": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "stage",
          "name",
          "tool"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "stage": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "tool": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "description": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "inputs": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "type": "string"
            }
          },
          "outputs": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "type": "string"
            }
          },
          "required": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "supported_tools": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "type": "string"
            }
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "pipeline_config": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "fail_on_validation_error": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "continue_on_warning": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "parallel_compilation": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "log_level": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "debug",
            "info",
            "warning",
            "error"
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "additionalProperties": true
}
```
